name: @pryzm/plugin-curtain-wall
description: PRYZM 2 — Curtain-wall plugin (S12-T5). Headless half: Store<CurtainWallData>, typed errors, 9 handlers (CreateCurtainWall / DeleteCurtainWall / MoveCurtainWall / SetCurtainWallGrid / SetCurtainWallMullionType / SetCurtainWallTransomType / SetCurtainWallPanelType / SetCurtainWallOutline / ResizeCurtainWall). Producer (packages/geometry-kernel/src/producers/curtainwall.ts) is split into _internal/curtain-wall/{buildPanels,buildMullions,buildTransoms,composeCurtainWallGeometryHash}. Committer / tool live under src/committer/.
